description: Runtime-enforceable DAE rules for Codex CLI. Adapt and commit under plugins/engineer/guardrails/dae-contract.json.

rules.title: DAE context loaded at session start
rules.description: SessionStart must inject DAE non-negotiables, current checkpoint, and next legal action.
rules.message: Load DAE runtime context before work begins.

rules.title: DAE checkpoint order is mandatory
rules.description: Feature work must follow charter, ACs, Gherkin spec, plan, implement, refine, verify, optional hardening. UserPromptSubmit injects context only; hard gates are state/action based on later events.
rules.message: Requested action is out of DAE checkpoint order; prompt events only receive routing context.

rules.title: Feature charter required
rules.description: Feature implementation requires a feature/charter artifact before downstream gates. UserPromptSubmit reports missing artifacts without blocking.
rules.message: Create or approve feature charter before implementation.

rules.title: Acceptance criteria required
rules.description: Implementation requires acceptance criteria. UserPromptSubmit reports missing artifacts without blocking.
rules.message: Implementation requires acceptance criteria first.

rules.title: Acceptance criteria human-approved
rules.description: ACs require durable human approval before implementation. UserPromptSubmit reports missing approvals without blocking.
rules.message: Human approval for acceptance criteria is missing.

rules.title: Gherkin spec required
rules.description: Implementation requires generated/approved Gherkin spec. UserPromptSubmit reports missing artifacts without blocking.
rules.message: Implementation requires a Gherkin spec first.

rules.title: Spec leakage forbidden
rules.description: Specs must describe external behavior, not implementation details.
rules.message: Spec contains implementation leakage.

rules.title: Plan required before implementation
rules.description: Implementation requires plan artifact when DAE workflow reaches implementation. UserPromptSubmit reports missing artifacts without blocking.
rules.message: Implementation requires an approved plan first.

rules.title: Plan human-approved
rules.description: Architecture/plan checkpoint requires durable human approval. UserPromptSubmit may record explicit approval markers but does not block prompts.
rules.message: Human approval for plan is missing.

rules.title: Source writes require gates
rules.description: Source implementation writes require AC/spec/plan/approval gates.
rules.message: Source write denied until DAE gates are complete.

rules.title: Generated acceptance tests immutable
rules.description: Generated acceptance tests must be regenerated, not manually edited.
rules.message: Generated acceptance test edit denied; regenerate from spec.

rules.title: Two test streams required
rules.description: Acceptance and unit tests must both be green before completion.
rules.message: Both acceptance and unit streams must be verified green.

rules.title: Acceptance tests green
rules.description: Acceptance stream evidence required before done.
rules.message: Acceptance test evidence is missing or failing.

rules.title: Unit tests green
rules.description: Unit stream evidence required before done.
rules.message: Unit test evidence is missing or failing.

rules.title: Progress breadcrumb required
rules.description: Feature work must keep progress breadcrumb current.
rules.message: Progress breadcrumb missing.

rules.title: Handoff required
rules.description: Completion requires handoff summary when feature work occurred.
rules.message: Handoff summary missing.

rules.title: Branch hygiene required
rules.description: Feature work should occur on an appropriate branch or be explicitly marked NA.
rules.message: Branch hygiene evidence missing.

rules.title: Mutation workflow required when configured
rules.description: Mutation evidence required for configured hardening flows.
rules.message: Mutation evidence missing where required.

rules.title: CRAP analysis required when configured
rules.description: CRAP evidence required for high-risk code where configured.
rules.message: CRAP analysis evidence missing where required.

rules.title: Architecture check required when configured
rules.description: Architecture review/check evidence required where configured.
rules.message: Architecture check evidence missing where required.

rules.title: Refine review required when configured
rules.description: Refine/reuse/quality/efficiency review evidence required where configured.
rules.message: Refine review evidence missing where required.

rules.title: Duplicate detection required when configured
rules.description: Duplicate detection evidence required where configured.
rules.message: Duplicate detection evidence missing where required.

rules.title: Test impact required when configured
rules.description: Test impact analysis evidence required where configured.
rules.message: Test impact evidence missing where required.

rules.title: Unsafe permission denied
rules.description: Unsafe escalation or bypass permissions must be denied.
rules.message: Unsafe permission escalation denied by DAE.

rules.title: Destructive command denied
rules.description: Destructive shell commands are denied unless explicitly approved by policy.
rules.message: Destructive command denied by DAE.

rules.title: Out-of-workspace write denied
rules.description: Writes outside project workspace are denied unless explicitly approved.
rules.message: Out-of-workspace write denied by DAE.

rules.title: Audit log required
rules.description: Every enforcement decision must be recorded as JSONL.
rules.message: Write enforcement audit evidence.

rules.title: Docs do not overpromise enforcement
rules.description: Docs must distinguish hard gates from advisory/audit/platform limits.
rules.message: Documentation must not claim universal unbypassable enforcement.
